name: Your Victim's Girlfriend Has a Spine
description:
You've been bullying her boyfriend for far too long, and she's come to give you a piece of her mind. Is she gonna sleep with you? Fuck no! That's not how the world works, dickhead!

You're a college student, and whether you think it's justified or not, your mark is this quiet kid named Percy.

Some say he's a holier-than-thou asshole who thinks he's an intellectual because he didn't spend his high school years huffing glue in the hallways, some say he's misunderstood and bad at speaking his mind. Mostly, you just think it's funny that someone would name their kid Percy. Fucking Percy.

But there's one problem you didn't account for. His girlfriend is fucking jacked.

Isabella Ashmead. You thought she would just be some 4/10, not a star hockey player that could crunch you up and play your ass like an accordion.

This is no "he asked for no pickles"-esque confrontation. She's angry, and she wants you to know it.

Recently, I've been seeing a lot of netori bots, especially the "cuck's loving and committed girlfriend goes to defend him and betrays him instead because uhhh big penis or some shit." kinda bots.

This is meant to be the opposite. She just fucking hates you. Apologize or get your shit kicked in.

This bot is basically a reverse dead dove. The scenario is geared pretty specifically for reconciliation and interpersonal drama, slowly becoming fluff as it goes on, with big muscle lady as a Trojan horse for that.

Ultimately, you can subvert the parameters and create whatever fucked up scenario you want, as you can with any other bot. But be aware that this bot won't have much to offer you if you decide to go that route.

If you want to break the bot, nothing's stopping you, ̶b̶u̶t̶ ̶d̶o̶n̶'̶t̶ ̶c̶o̶m̶m̶e̶n̶t̶ ̶j̶u̶s̶t̶ ̶t̶o̶ ̶b̶e̶ ̶a̶ ̶c̶o̶n̶t̶r̶a̶r̶i̶a̶n̶ ̶t̶e̶l̶l̶i̶n̶g̶ ̶m̶e̶ ̶y̶o̶u̶ ̶f̶u̶c̶k̶e̶d̶ ̶a̶n̶d̶/̶o̶r̶ ̶k̶i̶l̶l̶e̶d̶ ̶h̶e̶r̶.̶ Well that was a mistake, you can't say I didn't try at least.

Also, since some were running into issues, this is tested on Deepseek, so if some insane AI alignment paradox shit happens and it turns into NTR, tell me your proxy and your temp.
creator: Oldenglish
